title: • Week 1 | Weekly Writing Warm-Up (Submission in Canvas)
content:
• Week 1 | Weekly Writing Warm-Up (Submission in Canvas)

II. Proust Questionnaire Icebreaker (20 minutes)
1. Purpose
• A fun and engaging activity to introduce students to self-reflection and deeper thinking about their writing identities.
2. Instructions
• Answer questions that explore values, aspirations, and perspectives on life and writing.
• Encourage open participation and sharing.
3. Transition
• Discuss how personal reflection informs writing style and voice.

III. Lecture: The Importance of Grammar, Punctuation, and Spelling (45 minutes)
1. Grammar
• The system and structure of a language, including syntax (sentence structure), morphology (word formation), and phonology (sound system).
• Proper grammar ensures clarity, coherence, and professionalism.
a. Discussion Questions:
• Concrete: Can you think of a time when grammar confusion led to a misunderstanding? What grammar rules do you find most challenging?
• Abstract: Does grammar reflect intelligence? Can breaking grammar rules ever be justified?
context: From document: Week 1, Day 1 Class Schedule — chunk 2 (chunk 2/6)
